title: Server Password
description: Server Password is a server-wide authentication plugin that protects access to your Minecraft server using a secure, fully GUI-based password system.
body:
![Server Password Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ccc1776ada8e1953712b0d62ff1e799f29545f5.png)

**Server Password** is a server-wide authentication plugin that protects access to your Minecraft server using a secure, fully GUI-based password system.

Instead of typing passwords in chat, players authenticate through a custom interactive code interface, ensuring a clean, safe, and modern login experience — even on offline-mode servers.


## **Key Features**
- Server-wide password protection
- Fully GUI-based login (no chat input)
- Custom code interface
- Supports numbers and uppercase letters (0–9, A–Z)
- Automatic password length detection
- Centered layout for any password size
- Clear and submit controls
- Advanced security flow
- Players are frozen, invulnerable, and hidden while authenticating
- Chat, commands, movement, damage, and interaction are blocked
- Join messages and tablist visibility are delayed until login is successful
- Custom head textures
- Login timeout system
- Configurable authentication timeout
- Visual countdown timer inside the GUI
- Custom actions on timeout (kick or reopen)
- Attempt & ban protection
- Configurable attempts per join
- Cooldown between attempts
- Optional IP-based ban system
- Permanent or temporary bans supported
- Full multilingual support
- Reload configuration without restarting

## **Compatibility**
- Supports Spigot / Paper **1.20.1+**
- Works on online-mode and offline-mode servers
- No dependencies required




### **Disclaimer**
Server Password provides an additional security layer to help control access to your Minecraft server.

This plugin is not intended to replace proper server security practices such as firewalls, anti-bot protection, secure configurations, or other security plugins.

We are not responsible for any damage, data loss, unauthorized access, or other issues caused by:
- External attacks or exploits
- Misconfiguration or improper usage
- Software vulnerabilities
- Third-party tools or clients that bypass the system

By using this plugin, you acknowledge that no security system is 100% secure and that Server Password should be used as part of a broader security strategy.
